content.text: Done. Added `GET /users/:id` to `src/server.ts:15-24`: it matches the path with a regex, looks up the user by decoded id, and returns 200 with the user as JSON — falling through to the existing 404 response when no match. A small vitest file (`src/server.test.ts`) covers both the hit and miss cases; both pass.
